column1: # BÉPO 1.1 finger assignments for touch typing.
# Each BÉPO character is mapped to the finger that types it in standard touch-typing technique.
# This file is the source of truth for the finger-conflict check (chords that need the same finger twice are rejected).
# Fingers: L_pinky, L_ring, L_middle, L_index, R_index, R_middle, R_ring, R_pinky
# Edit any line that doesn't match how you actually type. Fingers don't lie — chords designed against this map will be ergonomic for you specifically.
